> ⚠️ **No PHI.** Use synthetic or fabricated examples only.

**The need**
What problem would this solve, for whom (registry lead, tumour board, research group, …)?

**Proposed change**
What you have in mind.

**Fit with NoteVahti's boundaries** (please check)
- [ ] Keeps the validation core deterministic, offline, model-free (or is an optional layer on top)
- [ ] Does not turn NoteVahti into an extractor or a medical device
- [ ] Does not claim a calibrated/guaranteed error rate
- [ ] Preserves the independent-anchor (non-circular) rule
